mapper.select: SELECT permission_id FROM sp_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sp_role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id NOT IN
#{permissionId}
